productDisplayName: Jockey LCESCBRA Men Pack of 3 Socks 2004
description: Pack of 3 socks; 2 charcoal grey and 1 grey Crew ribbed socks with elastane cuffs for a firm grip - preventing the sock from sagging, has terry inside for superior cushioning and absorbency, special designing for comfort in the toe region and branding on the cuffs
